events.text: Sidny Cabral (Cabo Verde) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Willy Semedo replaces Jovane Cabral because of an injury.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Deroy Duarte replaces Laros Duarte.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Nuno da Costa replaces Dailon Livramento.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Fabián Ruiz.
Substitution, Spain. Lamine Yamal replaces Gavi.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. João Paulo replaces Sidny Cabral.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Telmo Arcanjo replaces Jamiro Monteiro.
Substitution, Spain. Dani Olmo replaces Ferran Torres.
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Rodri.
Pedri (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
